title: Personal Jurisdiction
summary: When a court may bind a defendant consistently with due process.
whyItMatters: Bar questions repeatedly test minimum contacts, purposeful availment, and fairness balancing.

title: Venue and Transfer
summary: Where the action may be filed and when it may be moved.
whyItMatters: Students must distinguish proper venue from convenience transfer and forum non conveniens.

title: Erie Doctrine
summary: How federal courts choose between state and federal law in diversity cases.
whyItMatters: The exam expects a step-by-step framework for conflicts between federal and state sources of law.
